name: intellij-styled-search
description: IntelliJ IDEA style project search — peek-like movable panel with workspace file results

commands.title: Diagnose Active File in Search Index

intellijStyledSearch.engine.markdownDescription: Search engine to use. `zoekt` runs the Rust local shard/mmap engine with automatic codesearch fallback when the runtime is unavailable or still warming up. `codesearch` uses the existing TypeScript planner plus ripgrep verifier.

intellijStyledSearch.excludeGlobs.description: Glob patterns to exclude from search.

intellijStyledSearch.searchOnOpen.description: Run the initial search immediately when Search UI opens with a prefilled query. Disabled by default so opening the UI only renders the lightweight query shell; press Enter or Run to search.

intellijStyledSearch.zoektIncrementalFil.description: Keep the zoekt index updated from confirmed editor saves and VS Code delete/rename operations. Disable to stop background zoekt update processes; manual index rebuild will still refresh search results.

intellijStyledSearch.zoektPrewarmOnActiv.description: Build or prepare zoekt on extension activation. Disabled by default so startup does not run cargo build or workspace indexing.

intellijStyledSearch.zoektBuildBinaryInB.description: When zoekt is selected but the binary is missing, schedule a delayed background build after a search. Disabled by default; use Rebuild Search Index to start this work explicitly.

intellijStyledSearch.zoektIndexInBackgro.description: When zoekt is selected but the index is missing, schedule delayed background indexing after a search. Disabled by default; searches show a rebuild recommendation and use fallback until Rebuild Search Index is run.

intellijStyledSearch.zoektBackgroundBuil.description: Delay before an opt-in background zoekt binary build starts.

intellijStyledSearch.zoektBackgroundInde.description: Delay before an opt-in background zoekt index build starts.

intellijStyledSearch.zoektWatchExternalF.description: Watch external filesystem delete events for zoekt incremental updates. Disabled by default so the extension does not subscribe to every workspace file event; saved editor documents and VS Code delete/rename operations are still tracked.

intellijStyledSearch.zoektUpdateDebounce.description: Debounce window for batching workspace file events before running a zoekt incremental update.

intellijStyledSearch.zoektUpdateCooldown.description: Minimum cooldown after a zoekt incremental update before another update may run.

intellijStyledSearch.zoektUpdateLogMinIn.description: Minimum interval between routine zoekt update log lines. Suppressed update logs are summarized in the next emitted line.

intellijStyledSearch.maxFileSize.description: Maximum file size (bytes) to include in search.

intellijStyledSearch.maxResults.description: How many match lines to load per batch. Scrolling near the bottom loads the next batch. Values at or below 0 fall back to the built-in default.

intellijStyledSearch.searchHistoryLimit.description: Maximum number of executed search queries to keep in the search history dropdown. Set to 0 to disable storing search history.

intellijStyledSearch.disableMonacoCaptur.description: Disable Monaco capture/prototype probing for search previews. Enabled by default to avoid CDP and renderer prototype hooks affecting VS Code UI responsiveness.

intellijStyledSearch.closeMainInspectorA.description: Close VS Code's shared main-process inspector after Search UI work. Enabled by default to keep the VS Code renderer responsive after CDP-based UI injection.

intellijStyledSearch.rendererPerfDiagnos.description: Enable renderer performance tracing for Search UI diagnosis. When enabled, panel open records frame gaps, event delay, event timing, long tasks, long animation frames, DOM counts, memory and phase markers in batched renderer logs.

intellijStyledSearch.rendererSafetyDiagn.description: Enable Search UI renderer safety snapshots in the output log. Disabled by default because each snapshot evaluates JavaScript in the VS Code renderer.

intellijStyledSearch.rendererInlayClickH.description: Enable the renderer-level direct click hook for call graph inlay hints. Enabled by default because VS Code native inlay commands may require hover/link activation instead of a single click.

intellijStyledSearch.disposeRendererPatc.description: Fully dispose the injected Search UI renderer patch when the panel is hidden. Disabled by default so direct inlay clicks can reuse the lightweight renderer hook without repeated CDP reinjection.

intellijStyledSearch.keepCdpOpenWhileSea.description: Keep the CDP bridge open while the Search UI panel is visible. Enabled by default to avoid repeated SIGUSR1/inspector reconnects during typing and incremental searches; cleanup still runs when the panel is hidden.

intellijStyledSearch.rendererBridgeSingl.description: How long to keep the renderer patch bridge warm after the Search UI is hidden when direct inlay clicks are enabled. This avoids repeatedly reacquiring the renderer patch during inlay navigation.

intellijStyledSearch.suspendIntelliSense.description: Temporarily stop and suppress IntelliSense Recursion renderer capture while the Search UI is visible. This avoids overlapping renderer prototype hooks from slowing VS Code.

intellijStyledSearch.mcpPort.description: Localhost port used by the call graph MCP JSON-RPC endpoint when `Start Call Graph MCP Server` is run. Set to 0 to let the OS choose a free port.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphWatchExter.description: Watch external filesystem create/change/delete events for call graph incremental updates. Disabled by default so call graph updates only follow confirmed VS Code save/create/delete/rename operations.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphConcurrenc.description: Maximum number of source files parsed concurrently when rebuilding the call graph. Set to 0 to auto-size from system parallelism, capped at 32.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphCpuBudgetP.description: Approximate extension-host CPU duty cycle used by call graph parsing. Lower values insert more idle time between parsed files so VS Code remains responsive during rebuild.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphMaxParserP.description: Maximum single cooldown pause inserted after a call graph parser slice. Set to 0 to disable the cap.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphMaxLineLen.description: Skip call graph parsing for files that contain a line longer than this many characters. This protects the extension host from minified or generated files.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphMaxLinesPe.description: Skip call graph parsing for files with more lines than this limit. This protects rebuild from pathological generated files.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphMaxReferen.description: Maximum usage/reference candidates extracted from a single file. Set to 0 for unlimited extraction.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphMaxAssigne.description: Maximum anonymous-assignment function names scanned per file for usage detection. Set to 0 for unlimited extraction.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphInlayHints.description: Show call graph relation links as inlay hints next to symbols. By default this surfaces callers, usages, and implementations.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphShowCallee.description: Also show callees in call graph inlay hints. Disabled by default because callers and usages are usually more useful for code navigation and agent context.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphImplementa.description: Provide Go to Implementation results from the call graph for interface and abstract symbols.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphExcludeGlo.description: Additional glob patterns excluded only from call graph rebuilds.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphIncludePos.description: Materialize ambiguous possible call graph edges. Disabled by default to avoid memory explosions in large repositories.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphIncludeUnr.description: Materialize unresolved, dynamic, and external callsites as one dynamic edge per callsite. This keeps dynamic calls visible without exploding ambiguous possible edges.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphMaxEdges.description: Maximum unique materialized call graph edges stored in memory during a rebuild.

intellijStyledSearch.callGraphMaxPossibl.description: Maximum possible target edges per ambiguous call when possible edges are enabled.
